\tzpentry{ID4707}{Text Hamiltonian}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID4707 introduces Text Hamiltonian as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation}\n\\mathcal{H}_\\text{ac} = \\int_V \\mathbf{\\Psi}_\\text{ac} \\cdot (\\nabla \\times \\mathbf{u}) \\, d^3x\n\\end{equation}
